items.briefing:
Australian organisations should be aware that the Australian Signals Directorate (ASD) has announced it will retire the Essential Eight cybersecurity framework within two years, with consultation now underway on a replacement. If your organisation uses the Essential Eight for compliance or security planning, watch this space — changes are coming and you'll want to be involved in or at least aware of the consultation process.

Separately, a vulnerability in Apple's macOS has been found that allows users to disable built-in security tools, which could leave Mac devices exposed. If your staff use Macs, ensure operating systems are fully updated.

**Tip:** Check Apple's latest macOS updates are applied across all organisational Mac devices today.

featured.title: ASD to retire Essential Eight within two years, consults on replacement
featured.quote: Australia's essential cybersecurity framework is being replaced, directly affecting national defence strategy.
